title: [WORKSHOP] Auto-Remediation: Gitea Pipeline Trigger
description: Detects a Davis problem, extracts remediation.url from the latest CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT event for the affected service, and POSTs to the Gitea dispatches API to roll back.

eventTrigger.filterQuery: event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE" AND (event.status_transition == "CREATED" OR event.status_transition == "UPDATED" OR event.status_transition == "REOPENED") AND (event.category == "ERROR")

lookup_remediation.name: lookup_remediation

input.query:
fetch events
| filter event.id == "{{event()["event.id"]}}"
| lookup [
  fetch events
  | filter event.type == "CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT" and dt.smartscape_source.type == "SERVICE"
  | fields dt.source_entity, remediation.url, remediation.event_type, timestamp
  | sort timestamp desc
  | dedup dt.source_entity
], sourceField:root_cause_entity_id, lookupField:dt.source_entity
| filter isNotNull(lookup.remediation.url)
| fields lookup.remediation.url, lookup.remediation.event_type

lookup_remediation.description: Find the latest CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT remediation hook for the root-cause service.

trigger_gitea_dispatch.name: trigger_gitea_dispatch
trigger_gitea_dispatch.description: POST to Gitea dispatches API with the event_type carried in the deployment event.
